mode.label: Evidence mode
mode.liveWarning: Selecting Live Lab builds a GPU-ready plan first — submit it explicitly from the Plan page.
mode.liveWarningKo: Live Lab을 선택하면 먼저 GPU 제출용 계획을 만듭니다 — Plan 화면에서 명시적으로 제출하세요.

home.title: Physical AI Safety Agent
home.subtitle: Safety-first experiment copilot for physical-AI teams. Pick a scenario to run, or jump straight to live monitoring.
home.runExperimentBody: Pick a scenario, review options, run. Returns a full safety-gated report.
home.monitorBody: Real-time GPU/process status. Submit / kill / collect jobs.
home.monitorBodyDisabled: Live Lab is disabled — flip the evidence mode to Live Lab to enable.
home.noReportBody: Run a workflow first; the report will appear here.
home.name: Name

runExperiment.title: Run Experiment
runExperiment.subtitle: Pick a scenario, tweak the options, run. The orchestrator designs the A/B pair, trains, evaluates, gates, and reports — usually in a few seconds.
runExperiment.step1Hint: Or skip this step and write a custom request below.
runExperiment.placeholder: Pick a scenario above, or describe your experiment here...
runExperiment.liveLabHardware: Operator-gated lab workflow. No robot action is sent without approval.
runExperiment.noSsh: No SSH, no hardware, no secrets.
runExperiment.liveWarningBody: Run workflow creates a GPU-ready plan only. Review the Plan page, then click Send plan to GPUs if you want to submit real training.
runExperiment.operatorCheckbox: I am the on-site operator and emergency stop is ready
runExperiment.operatorReady: I am the operator and emergency stop is ready
runExperiment.runReady: Ready. Click Run workflow — the orchestrator does the rest. You'll land on the Plan page with the result.
runExperiment.errorNeedRequest: Pick a scenario above or write a custom request first.
runExperiment.errorNeedOperator: Live Lab mode requires the operator confirmation: emergency stop must be ready.
runExperiment.publicSafe: Public demo: no SSH, no hardware, no secrets.

forwardFall.title: Fix forward falls
forwardFall.oneLine: Compare the previous stable baseline against a stability-focused treatment.

frozenGait.title: Unstick frozen gait
frozenGait.oneLine: Policy is stable but barely moves; boost velocity reward.

hardwareCheck.title: Hardware test gate
hardwareCheck.oneLine: Is this checkpoint safe to put on the real robot?

live.title: Live Control
live.subtitle: Real-time monitoring through the lab adapter.
live.subtitleTpl: Real-time monitoring of {{gpu0}} / {{gpu1}} through the lab adapter.
live.warning: Live Control is active. Submit, Kill, and Collect actions are operator-gated and logged.
live.warningBody: Lab adapter actions for {{gpu0}}/{{gpu1}} are recorded in the
live.noJobs: No jobs tracked yet. Use the submit form below, or run a workflow from Run Experiment.
live.notEnabledBody: Set GAITLAB_ENABLE_SSH=true and GAITLAB_LAB_REPO_PATH in .env and reload.
live.operatorConfirm: I am the operator and emergency stop is ready

replay.title: Sanitized Real Replay
replay.subtitle: Past training records derived from real robot lab experiments. All hostnames, credentials, raw logs, and checkpoints have been removed — only aggregate metrics and scalar curves are shown.
replay.notInReplayBody: Switch to 'Sanitized Real Replay' in the sidebar to browse past training records.

plan.title: Plan
plan.subtitle: Pair {{pairId}} — orchestrator's hypothesis and controlled variables.
plan.name: Name
plan.emptyBody: Run a workflow from Run Experiment to populate this view.
plan.liveSubmitTitle: Send this plan to training PCs
plan.liveSubmitBody: Run Experiment only builds the controlled plan. This button submits the baseline control job to {{controlName}} and the patched treatment job to {{treatmentName}} through the Live Lab adapter.
plan.liveSubmitted: Submitted control and treatment jobs to the live training rigs.
plan.baselinePatchEmpty: No patch. Uses the parent stage exactly as-is.

training.title: Training
training.subtitle: Control {{controlId}} vs treatment {{treatmentId}}.
training.chartCaption: Mock / replay modes show a single point per run. Live Lab mode will surface per-iteration scalars in a follow-up.

eval.title: Evaluation
eval.subtitle: Matched metrics from the Researcher PC.

safety.title: Safety
safety.subtitle: Deterministic sim-to-real gate result and required follow-ups.

history.title: Training History
history.subtitle: All training runs from control and treatment rigs. Browse, search, filter, and compare.
